list.name: Changes
list.comment: - Added personal accepted Microsoft login credentials - Updated Privacy Policy/licenses/Readme - Update checker added

task.summary: Default task
Game runs
26.1 Boots but other lower versions crash
All Versions Now Boot
Controller Touch Support
All Versions Tested Support
New UI Modrinth Like
Fabric Installation
Fabric Forge
- Added loader version dropdown in dialog
- Delete instances added - Changed how installs are handled, inherited instance don't install next to each other anymore unless toggled on
- Added Renderers - VulkanMod Support - Beta 1.7.3 Support
- Added Renderers - VulkanMod Support - Beta 1.7.3 Support - Fixed 26.2 Not Closing - Added Settings overlay
- Added Renderers - VulkanMod Support - Beta 1.7.3 Support - Fixed 26.2 Not Closing - Added Settings overlay - Legacy4J, Controllable, Controlify Support added
- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup
- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup - Ram Allocation
- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup - Ram Allocation - Custom Storage Option (Started)
- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup - Ram Allocation - Custom Storage Option (Started)

- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup - Ram Allocation - Custom Storage Option (Started) - Tab layout for mods, shaderpacks, resourcepacks, world - Option to browse mods/shaders etc which will be the next big project - Delete, disable mods, packs etc.

- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup - Ram Allocation - Custom Storage Option (Started) - Tab layout for mods, shaderpacks, resourcepacks, world - Option to browse mods/shaders etc which will be the next big project - Delete, disable mods, packs etc.

- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup - Ram Allocation - Custom Storage Option (Started) - Tab layout for mods, shaderpacks, resourcepacks, world - Option to browse mods/shaders etc which will be the next big project - Delete, disable mods, packs etc. - Delete file paths - Play worlds directly from list - Some more UI fixes and changes

- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup - Ram Allocation - Custom Storage Option (Started) - Tab layout for mods, shaderpacks, resourcepacks, world - Option to browse mods/shaders etc which will be the next big project - Delete, disable mods, packs etc. - Delete file paths - Play worlds directly from list - Some more UI fixes and changes - Added template for browse cotent

- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup - Ram Allocation - Custom Storage Option (Started) - Tab layout for mods, shaderpacks, resourcepacks, world - Option to browse mods/shaders etc which will be the next big project - Delete, disable mods, packs etc. - Delete file paths - Play worlds directly from list - Some more UI fixes and changes - Added template for browse cotent - Added Modrinth Mod Manager, download, delete, store mod info

- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup - Ram Allocation - Custom Storage Option (Started) - Tab layout for mods, shaderpacks, resourcepacks, world - Option to browse mods/shaders etc which will be the next big project - Delete, disable mods, packs etc. - Delete file paths - Play worlds directly from list - Some more UI fixes and changes - Added template for browse cotent - Added Modrinth Mod Manager, download, delete, store mod info - Added Curseforge download, delete,store metadata

MESSAGE.value: Fabric Forge
- Added loader version dropdown in dialog
- Delete instances added - Changed how installs are handled, inherited instance don't install next to each other anymore unless toggled on
- Added Renderers - VulkanMod Support - Beta 1.7.3 Support
- Added Renderers - VulkanMod Support - Beta 1.7.3 Support - Fixed 26.2 Not Closing - Added Settings overlay
- Added Renderers - VulkanMod Support - Beta 1.7.3 Support - Fixed 26.2 Not Closing - Added Settings overlay - Legacy4J, Controllable, Controlify Support added
- UI Cleanup - Settings Cleanup
